loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and aggregate stats (Avg/Max/Min); legend values and threshold lines are static seeds as no dedicated columns exist for those specific scalar slots.
